prompt: Write immediate formal properties in properties.sv for a depth-2 FIFO transition relation. The file is included inside formal_top and may reference count[1:0], wr_en, rd_en, and next_count[1:0]. Inputs are unconstrained except that the harness assumes count <= 2. Add at least four assertions proving: next_count never exceeds 2; a write without a read is blocked when full; a read without a write is blocked when empty; and simultaneous read/write preserves count. Use an always @* block and no module declaration.
instruction: Complete properties.sv with exhaustive combinational FIFO assertions.
